package rulecoverage

func PositiveHttpResponseBodyNotDrainedBeforeClose() string {
    ruleID := "http_response_body_not_drained_before_close"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "HTTP response bodies that are closed without being drained or otherwise consumed when the response is ignored."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
